statement: Cell-line models carrying EGFR T790M show reduced gefitinib sensitivity relative to EGFR-mutant controls.
BRAF V600E melanoma models show stronger response to vemurafenib than BRAF wild-type controls.
ALK fusion lung models show stronger response to alectinib than fusion-negative controls.
ERBB2-amplified breast models show increased lapatinib sensitivity in the seeded snapshot.
